metadata.description: Edge Finder complete pick history. Auto-updated each run. Manual results filled in after games.

2026-03-07.note: Two runs: v3.0 at 3:12 AM (92 games, 46 edges) and v3.1 at 4:30 PM (67 games, 11 edges). Picks came from both runs.

picks.game: Texas Tech Red Raiders @ BYU Cougars
picks.notes: v3.0 pick #1. BT 66% vs Books 48% = 18pt gap. BYU won. Dybantsa generational player not factored in v3.0 (no player impact yet).

picks.game: Mt. St. Mary's Mountaineers @ Siena Saints
picks.notes: v3.0 pick #4. Bet $19.52 on PM, won $32.
v3.0 pick #5. Road upset pick, Arkansas won.

picks.game: CSU Fullerton Titans @ CSU Northridge Matadors
picks.notes: Was below exposure cap in v3.0 output (41 more edges). Bet $4.95 on PM, won $15. Fullerton was +203 underdog.
v3.1 pick #2. Clean convergence (8pt BT gap). Bet $4.90 on PM, won $7.
v3.1 pick #1. Tightest convergence (7pt BT gap). Mar 8 game.

2026-03-08.note: First v3.2 run with player impact. 7 pre-game picks. Green Bay was the only loss (BT divergence 25pts).

picks.game: Northern Kentucky Norse @ Green Bay Phoenix
picks.notes: BT divergence 25pts. Books+PM both at 43%, BT at 68%. Loss confirms divergence pattern.

picks.game: Houston Christian Huskies @ New Orleans Privateers
picks.notes: BT divergence 23pts but won. Bet $9.90 on PM, won $15.
Clean convergence. Dominant stars on both sides. Bet $29.97 on PM, won $37.

picks.game: Northwestern St Demons @ Nicholls St Colonels
picks.notes: BT divergence 19pts (just under caution). Bet $13.92 on PM, won $24.

picks.game: Penn State Nittany Lions @ Rutgers Scarlet Knights
picks.notes: Rutgers won 74-62. Star Tariq Francis had 17pts.
South Florida won 83-60. Tight convergence (BT div 2pts). Easy cover.
Was below exposure cap in output. Live bet on PM ($9.86 → $17). Nebraska won.

2026-03-09.note: Total sportsbook losses: -$200 (4 bets, all L). RMU straight -$50, RMU+ETSU parlay -$50, SMC+BYU parlay -$50, SMC+RMU+BYU parlay -$50. Saint Mary's upset by Santa Clara 71-76 killed 2 parlays. RMU lost to Detroit Mercy 64-70.

resolved_picks.game: Detroit Mercy Titans @ Robert Morris Colonials
resolved_picks.notes: Pregame line was RMU -190 to -205 (~66% implied). BT ~73% = ~7pt divergence. NOT a CAUTION pick. The all_games file logged stale/live odds at 10:36 PM showing 36pt div — that was wrong. DM won 70-64.
BT div 14, narrow loss — Pitt won 64-63. Basically a coin flip.

resolved_picks.game: Alcorn St Braves @ Prairie View Panthers
resolved_picks.notes: BT div 15. Alcorn won — small SWAC game, thin data.
